text:
Pig (ブタ型, Buta-gata—lit. "Pig-type") Hunter × Hunter - Episode 84 (2011) is a Chimera Ant and former Drudge tasked with preparing the Queen's meals. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 197 

Appearance

Pig has the appearance of a large bipedal pig. He is seen wearing a chef's uniform, hat, and apron. 

Personality

Not much is known about Pig's personality, though he was loyal and obedient towards the Chimera Ant Queen and, once later, to the newly born Neferpitou; Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 198 even though the work he does for them was arduous and stressful. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Peggy and Rammot visit Pig and inquire if he's recently found any rare humans. He answers no and adds that even if there were any, he would have probably fed them to the Queen already, who currently consumes 250 meatballs daily. 

Under Neferpitou's orders, Pig butchers Pokkle, right after they finish torturing the subject. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga, and the 2011 anime adaptation only identifies him by his type of species in the credits.
He is referred to as ブタ型 (Buta-gata, Nippon TV - HUNTER×HUNTER - Chimera Ant: characters page literally "Pig-type").
In the credits for the English dub: "Pig". 

Anime and Manga Differences

Originally in the manga, when Neferpitou finished torturing Pokkle, he chops up and kills him in order to feed the Chimera Ant Queen. This was omitted in the 2011 anime adaptation.
